source: Embark on a scenic journey through the Garden of England. Explore the Kent countryside aboard Southeastern services via the county town of Maidstone, hugging the bank of the River Medway and weaving through both industrious and rural landscapes between Strood, Paddock Wood and Tonbridge.
target: 开启一段穿梭于英格兰花园的壮丽旅程。搭乘 Southeastern 公司的列车穿越肯特郡乡间，经由郡治梅德斯通，紧贴梅德韦河岸，在斯特鲁德、帕多克伍德与汤布里奇之间的工业景观与田园风光中穿行。
